content.body:
- LICENSE: MIT (Vitor Marino, 2026)
- README.md: rewritten for external audience (install, quickstart, architecture, commands)
- CONTRIBUTING.md: setup, project structure, TDD process, commit conventions, PR flow
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md: Contributor Covenant v2.1
- SECURITY.md: vulnerability reporting via GitHub Security Advisories
- Issue templates: bug report, feature request, adapter proposal, config
- PR template: change type, checklist, issue link

Closes #23, closes #24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: docs: add MIT license, templates, and open-source governance docs
